message:
fix(codegen): Handle reassigned parameters in init methods

Add var_tracking.isParamReassignedInStmts check for ALL init parameters,
not just those in renamed_params. When a parameter is reassigned in the
function body (like `if cond: shape = new_value`), create a mutable
local copy to avoid shadowing the immutable function parameter.

This fixes Zig compile errors like:
  "local variable 'shape' shadows function parameter from outer scope"
